title: Open split view automatically when viewing a number widget in full-screen
excerpt:

posts.author: nkasp (Nick K.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Not sure if this rises to the level of a “feature request,” but it would be great if the number widget would automatically open in split view when going full-screen. If I’m opening a number widget in full-screen view, I’m never doing it just to see the number by itself in the middle of the screen; I’m doing it to see the items that are contributing to that number.

What are you trying to achieve

Reduce clicks when interacting with number widgets.

posts.author: mattczh (Matthew Chan)
posts.cookedHtml: Bumping this up - this would really help my implementation for management
